creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #1)
> I can see that you are using version 1.5.0 of belle-sip rather than version 1.6.3 the latest one of belle-sip.
Hi!
It was 5 months ago - 1.5.0 was latest.
1.6.3 doesn't require MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes any more on all my hosts.
